'''鈭歮-v-h-zh''' ('''kamavhezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:camelize|camelize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-v-h-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:camelize|camelize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-v-h-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kamavhezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimavhezhoko|thimavhezhoko]] || [[word:jimavhezhoko|jimavhezhoko]] || [[word:shimavhezhoko|shimavhezhoko]] || [[word:kimavhezhoko|kimavhezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumavhezhoko|thuthumavhezhoko]] || [[word:jujumavhezhoko|jujumavhezhoko]] || [[word:shushumavhezhoko|shushumavhezhoko]] || [[word:kukumavhezhoko|kukumavhezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumavhezhoko|thumavhezhoko]] || [[word:jumavhezhoko|jumavhezhoko]] || [[word:shumavhezhoko|shumavhezhoko]] || [[word:kumavhezhoko|kumavhezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumavhezhoko|thumavhezhoko]] || [[word:jumavhezhoko|jumavhezhoko]] || [[word:shumavhezhoko|shumavhezhoko]] || [[word:kumavhezhoko|kumavhezhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themavhezhoko|themavhezhoko]] || [[word:jemavhezhoko|jemavhezhoko]] || [[word:shemavhezhoko|shemavhezhoko]] || [[word:kemavhezhoko|kemavhezhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomavhezhoko|thothomavhezhoko]] || [[word:jojomavhezhoko|jojomavhezhoko]] || [[word:shoshomavhezhoko|shoshomavhezhoko]] || [[word:kokomavhezhoko|kokomavhezhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomavhezhoko|thomavhezhoko]] || [[word:jomavhezhoko|jomavhezhoko]] || [[word:shomavhezhoko|shomavhezhoko]] || [[word:komavhezhoko|komavhezhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomavhezhoko|thomavhezhoko]] || [[word:jomavhezhoko|jomavhezhoko]] || [[word:shomavhezhoko|shomavhezhoko]] || [[word:komavhezhoko|komavhezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙mavhezhoko|th忙mavhezhoko]] || [[word:j忙mavhezhoko|j忙mavhezhoko]] || [[word:sh忙mavhezhoko|sh忙mavhezhoko]] || [[word:k忙mavhezhoko|k忙mavhezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamavhezhoko|thathamavhezhoko]] || [[word:jajamavhezhoko|jajamavhezhoko]] || [[word:shashamavhezhoko|shashamavhezhoko]] || [[word:kakamavhezhoko|kakamavhezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamavhezhoko|thamavhezhoko]] || [[word:jamavhezhoko|jamavhezhoko]] || [[word:shamavhezhoko|shamavhezhoko]] || [[word:kamavhezhoko|kamavhezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamavhezhoko|thamavhezhoko]] || [[word:jamavhezhoko|jamavhezhoko]] || [[word:shamavhezhoko|shamavhezhoko]] || [[word:kamavhezhoko|kamavhezhoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
